title: Lots of Vanilla Beans
description: A truly Vanilla+ modpack, with lots of tasty vanilla beans
body:
# A Truly Vanilla+ Experience
_vanilla beans sold separately_


![Terralith mountain range](https://imgur.com/ixJmFG3.png)

**Lots of Vanilla Beans** is a true Vanilla+ modpack, bringing very little in terms of new content, yet still enhancing the beloved feel of good ol' vanilla Minecraft.

Aesthetics, quality of life, and small but impactful additions are at the core of this pack. No new ores, no overhauled dimensions, hardly even any new items (_heck, JEI isn't even included because of how few new items there are!_)

![Player with backpack looking at mountain range ](https://imgur.com/7sNUdYq.png)

With [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), and a select choice of shaders and resource packs, experience Minecraft in its most beautiful form, exploring across a diverse and immense variety of biomes and landscapes.

![Nether fortress](https://imgur.com/eCPj7Qz.png)

Experience structures like never before, with the full suite of **YUNG's Better Structures**, as well as [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village) and [Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers). Additionally, explore a more dramatic nether with [Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether), making the pits of the underworld even more ominous.

![End portal with End Remastered eyes](https://imgur.com/9a8CRZ6.png)

Throughout your exploration, gather unique Eyes from [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) to complete the end portal, unlocking a more difficult and intense dragon fight from [Ender Dragon Fight Remastered](https://modrinth.com/datapack/edf-remastered).

![End dragon fight](https://imgur.com/omYBpWp.png)

What're you waiting for? Plenty of flavorful vanilla awaits you


## Other Notable Additions
